question: A student scored 72 marks out of 90. Find percentage.
The price of a book is ₹500. It is sold at ₹550. Find gain %.
A TV originally costs ₹12000. Price is reduced by 10%. Find new price.
In an exam, 90 students appeared. 72 passed. Find pass %.
A shirt costs ₹800. Sold at ₹880. Find profit %.
A sum of money ₹2000 is increased by 5%. Find new amount.
A shopkeeper gives 20% discount on ₹1500 shirt. Find selling price.
A student scored 45 marks out of 60. Find percentage.
Price of a mobile ₹8000 is increased by 10%, then decreased by 10%. Find final price.
explanation: 10% of 8000=800 → New price=8800 → decrease 10% of 8800=880 → Final=7920

question: A car costs ₹600000. Its price is increased by 8%. Find new price.
